entity.label: Sered
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Fear, one of the sons of Zebulun (Gen. 46:14).

nodes.label: Sered
nodes.description: Fear, one of the sons of Zebulun (Gen. 46:14).

nodes.label: Zebulun
nodes.description: Dwelling, the sixth and youngest son of Jacob and Leah (Gen. 30:20). Little is known of his personal history. He had three sons (46:14).

nodes.label: Elon
nodes.description: One of the sons of Zebulun (Gen. 46:14).

verses.text: And the sons of Zebulun; Sered, and Elon, and Jahleel.
Of the sons of Zebulun after their families: of Sered, the family of the Sardites: of Elon, the family of the Elonites: of Jahleel, the family of the Jahleelites.
